summary: API identity/authz persistence foundation meets acceptance criteria; all API static validations pass. migration:show fails only due to missing MySQL service in tester environment.

checks.name: api-migration-show
checks.command: AUTH_PASSWORD_PEPPER=development-pepper-value AUTH_PASSWORD_BCRYPT_ROUNDS=12 AUTH_SESSION_TTL_MINUTES=1440 AUTH_SESSION_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MINUTES=120 AUTH_TOTP_ISSUER='SFUS Development' AUTH_RECOVERY_CODE_COUNT=10 AUTH_RECOVERY_CODE_LENGTH=12 npx --yes pnpm@10.0.0 --filter @sfus/api run migration:show
checks.details: getaddrinfo EAI_AGAIN mysql (no MySQL service running in this worktree)
